method: Alpaca-backed local feasibility test for a structural ORB pullback-reclaim entry on top of v26 exits. Instead of entering on the first breakout, the branch waits for breakout, pullback toward the ORB boundary, and reclaim confirmation before entering.

structural_conclusion.research_interpretation: This branch changes the ORB trade architecture itself by delaying entry until a breakout proves itself, pulls back, and reclaims the ORB boundary. Because entry timestamps differ, path-impact metrics based on common entry times are only secondary diagnostics here.
structural_conclusion.next_step_rule: Only build a Blueshift evaluator if the strongest variant improves full-sample Alpaca PnL and also shows at least 2/4 improved time folds and 3+ improved years.
